title: Add per-agent task count badge and expandable task list to /agents page
implementation_notes: In agents/index.vue, after fetchVaultAgents(), also fetch the vault read model: const model = await loadVaultReadModel().
Compute a Map<agentId, TaskSummary[]> where TaskSummary = { id, title, status, column }.
The assignee field on tasks is an agent name (e.g. 'agent-backend-dev'). Match tasks by task.assignee === agent.name (or agent.id).
On each registered agent card: show a pill badge with the active task count (tasks where status is 'in-progress' or 'todo'). If 0, show a muted '0 tasks' label.
Add a 'View tasks' toggle button (chevron icon) under the Launch Process button. On click: expand an inline panel below the card listing tasks as rows (id, title, status badge, column chip).
If the agent has no tasks, show 'No tasks assigned' inside the expanded panel.
Poll interval already exists for fetchRunners — extend it to also refresh the task map every 10 seconds.
Do not change the 'Launch Process' or process management behaviour.
acceptance_criteria: Each agent card shows a task count badge reflecting the current read model.
Clicking 'View tasks' toggles an inline task list for that agent.
Task list shows id, title, status, and column for each task assigned to the agent.
Task list refreshes automatically every 10 seconds.
completion_summary: Added per-agent task count badges and expandable inline task lists on /agents backed by the live vault read model and periodic refresh.
